verbGlossary.ACOUSTICS PERFORMANCE SPECIFIED BY: {target} defines acoustic absorption and sound isolation requirements for the installed system
verbGlossary.ADA COMPLIANCE REVIEWED BY: {target}verifies that {source} meets Americans with Disabilities Act accessibility standards
verbGlossary.ADA SIGNAGE REQUIRED BY: Government {target} mandates compliant wayfinding and identification signage per accessibility codes
verbGlossary.AIR BALANCE VERIFIED BY: {source}measures and certifies that airflow rates match design specifications across all zones
verbGlossary.AIR HANDLERS SUPPLIED BY: {target} delivers factory-assembled air handling units to the jobsite per approved submittals
verbGlossary.ALARM ACCEPTANCE TESTED BY: {target} witnesses and approves the fire alarm system functional test before occupancy
verbGlossary.COLOR PALETTE SELECTED BY: {target} or developer approves the paint color scheme and finish selections for interior surfaces
verbGlossary.COMPACTION TESTED BY: Testing lab performs in-place density tests on fill material to verify it meets compaction specifications
verbGlossary.CONCRETE PLACED BY: {target} or trade crew pours, vibrates, and finishes concrete for the structural element
verbGlossary.COOLING PERFORMANCE COMMISSIONED BY: {source}tests refrigeration equipment performance against design conditions and documents results
verbGlossary.COVERAGE PATTERN APPROVED BY: {target} reviews sprinkler head layout to ensure adequate spray coverage per NFPA spacing requirements
verbGlossary.DETAIL DESIGNED BY: Architect develops the construction detail drawing that governs how {target} is assembled at transitions
verbGlossary.DISCHARGE PERMITTED BY: {source}issues the permit allowing pumped groundwater to be discharged during dewatering
verbGlossary.DOMESTIC WATER DESIGNED BY: {target} sizes piping, calculates pressure, and specifies materials for the potable water system
verbGlossary.DOOR SCHEDULE SPECIFIED BY: {target} defines the door type, size, fire rating, hardware, and frame for each opening in the schedule
verbGlossary.DRAINAGE ENGINEERED BY: Civil {target} designs the stormwater collection, conveyance, and detention system
verbGlossary.DRAINAGE SIZED BY: {target} calculates required roof drain capacities and pipe sizes based on rainfall intensity
verbGlossary.DRAW RELEASE INSPECTED BY: {source}inspects installed building elements before authorizing the next draw disbursement
verbGlossary.EGRESS COMPLIANCE REVIEWED BY: {target}verifies that {source} meets egress, light, and ventilation code requirements
verbGlossary.ELEVATOR EQUIPMENT INSTALLED BY: Specialty {target} installs elevator motors, controllers, and guide rail systems
verbGlossary.ELEVATOR PERMIT ISSUED BY: {target} issues the installation permit and schedules required inspections for vertical conveyance
verbGlossary.EMERGENCY BACKUP CERTIFIED BY: {target} certifies that the emergency power system meets code requirements for life safety loads
verbGlossary.ENGINEERED AND BUILT BY: Design-build entity both designs and constructs {target} under a single contract
verbGlossary.EQUIPMENT FURNISHED BY: {target}provides heavy equipment needed to execute {source}'s installation scope
verbGlossary.EROSION MONITORED BY: {source}monitoring {target} inspects sediment controls and documents site compliance during construction
verbGlossary.EXCAVATED BY: {target}performs the earth removal, trenching, or mass excavation work for {source}
verbGlossary.FIXTURE SELECTIONS APPROVED BY: {target} or developer reviews and approves the specific fixture models and finishes for the project
verbGlossary.FLAME SPREAD RATING VERIFIED BY: Fire marshal con{target}s that the insulation material flame and smoke ratings meet code limits
verbGlossary.FLOORING SCOPE MANAGED BY: Construction manager coordinates procurement, scheduling, and quality for the specialty flooring trade
verbGlossary.GAS SERVICE CONNECTED BY: Gas utility installs the meter and connects the building gas service to the distribution main
verbGlossary.GLAZING SUPPLIED BY: Material {target} delivers insulated glass units and window assemblies to the jobsite
verbGlossary.HYDRAULICALLY CALCULATED BY: Fire protection {target} performs hydraulic calculations to size sprinkler mains and verify water supply adequacy
verbGlossary.INSULATION SPEC WRITTEN BY: Specifications writer develops the detailed product and performance specification section for insulation materials
verbGlossary.INTEGRATION COMMISSIONED BY: {source}tests and verifies that the building automation system integrates all connected subsystems
verbGlossary.LIGHTING LAYOUT DESIGNED BY: {source} placement, circuiting, and control zoning plan
verbGlossary.LOAD PATHS DESIGNED BY: {target} designs member sizes and connections to transfer gravity and lateral loads through the structure
verbGlossary.LOSS PREVENTION RATED BY: {source}carrier evaluates fire protection adequacy and adjusts property insurance premiums based on installed systems
verbGlossary.MEASURED FOR: {source}measure tracks performance or compliance metrics attributable to this building element scope
verbGlossary.MEMBRANE APPLIED BY: {target} installs the roof membrane system including adhesion, seaming, and termination details
verbGlossary.MILLWORK FABRICATED BY: {target} builds custom casework and millwork in a shop per approved shop drawings
verbGlossary.PERFORMANCE TESTED BY: Envelope {target} conducts field performance testing such as water infiltration and air leakage tests on the assembly
verbGlossary.PERIMETER SAFETY ENFORCED BY: {source}that temporary fencing and barriers meet fall protection and public safety requirements during construction
verbGlossary.PILE DRIVING INSPECTED BY: {source} installation depth, blow counts, and alignment during driving operations
verbGlossary.PIPING SYSTEM DESIGNED BY: {target} designs pipe routing, sizing, material selection, and supports for the hydronic distribution system
verbGlossary.PLANTING PLAN DESIGNED BY: {source} {target} designs the planting palette, spacing, irrigation, and grading for landscaped areas
verbGlossary.POWER SERVICE CONNECTED BY: {source}s and makes the permanent electrical service connection to the building
verbGlossary.PRECAST MANUFACTURED BY: {target} casts, cures, and finishes precast concrete or metal panels at an off-site manufacturing facility
verbGlossary.R-VALUE COMPLIANCE VERIFIED BY: Sustainability consultant con{target}s that the installed roof insulation meets energy code R-value requirements
verbGlossary.RACEWAY ROUTED BY: Self-performing {target} division lays out and installs conduit and cable tray pathways through the structure
verbGlossary.REBAR PLACEMENT INSPECTED BY: {source} size, spacing, cover, and tie-wire before concrete is placed
verbGlossary.SANITARY CAPACITY APPROVED BY: {source}reviews and approves that the sanitary sewer connection meets capacity and code requirements
verbGlossary.SECURITY REQUIREMENTS SET BY: Institutional {target} defines the access control, surveillance, and intrusion detection requirements for the facility
verbGlossary.SELF-PERFORMED BY: GC's own forces execute {target} scope rather than subcontracting it to a trade contractor
verbGlossary.SERVICE ENTRANCE PROVIDED BY: {source}, cabling, and demarcation equipment at the building service entrance
verbGlossary.SETBACK COMPLIANCE REVIEWED BY: Zoning {target} verifies that hardscape improvements fall within permitted setback and lot coverage limits
verbGlossary.SHEET METAL INSTALLED BY: {target} fabricates and installs ductwork, fittings, and connections per mechanical drawings
verbGlossary.SHOP FABRICATED BY: {target} manufactures miscellaneous metal items such as handrails, ladders, and supports in a controlled shop environment
verbGlossary.SITE WORK COORDINATED BY: Construction manager agency coordinates scheduling and sequencing of site improvement trades
verbGlossary.SOIL CONDITIONS ASSESSED BY: Geotechnical {target} evaluates subsurface conditions and provides bearing capacity and excavation recommendations
verbGlossary.SPECIALTY SCOPE COORDINATED BY: {source} procurement, submittals, and installation sequencing across multiple trades
verbGlossary.STEEL FABRICATED BY: {target} cuts, welds, and assembles structural steel members per approved shop drawings and detailing
verbGlossary.STRUCTURALLY DESIGNED BY: Structural engineer designs {target}'s size, reinforcement, and capacity per applicable structural codes
verbGlossary.TAP CONNECTION APPROVED BY: Water/sewer {target} reviews and approves the tap size and connection point to the municipal water main
verbGlossary.THERMAL VALUE CALCULATED BY: Sustainability {target} performs thermal modeling to verify the insulation assembly meets energy code requirements
verbGlossary.UTILITY METERING COORDINATED BY: Electric utility coordinates metering equipment, CT cabinet placement, and service entrance configuration
verbGlossary.WARRANTY BOND SECURED BY: {target}issues a warranty bond guaranteeing {source}'s performance for a specified period
